name: ArGo silicone caps for mouthpieces (4 pieces)
summary: Made from silicone, these caps are specifically created for the ArGo 's glass mouthpieces.
description: Made from silicone, these caps are specifically created for the ArGo 's glass mouthpieces. They guarantee your herbs remain securely in the glass mouthpiece when transporting. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
